Task description and README.md goal section
Task description; GitHub API and web search confirm repository exists and is maintained by Jenkins project (MIT license, 4.3k stars)
Task description states 'on the master branch'; GitHub API confirms 'master' is the default branch of jenkinsci/pipeline-examples
README.md line 20 shows 'H/15 * * * *' in full cron format; H/15 means every 15 minutes with hash-based load spreading to prevent SCM server overload
README.md line 23: 'Has a choice parameter named NODE_VERSION with options 16, 18, 20 (in that order)'
README.md line 24: 'Has a build discarder configured to keep only the last 7 builds'
README.md line 46: 'Pass threshold: 60 points'; also confirmed in verifier.py line 214

privileged_info_summary: The task deploys Jenkins CI configuration for a test environment named 'Project Alpha'. All metadata claims are verified: The backend build job (alpha-backend-build) must be a Pipeline that clones https://github.com/jenkinsci/pipeline-examples (a real, MIT-licensed Jenkins community repository with 4.3k stars) on the master branch and polls SCM using H/15 cron pattern (every 15 minutes with hash-based spreading). The frontend job (alpha-frontend-build) requires a NODE_VERSION choice parameter with options 16, 18, 20 in that order, and a build discarder keeping 7 builds. An npm-registry-token secret text credential must be provisioned. A 'Project-Alpha CI' list view must contain both jobs. Pass threshold is 60 out of 100 points.
